title: Clinical Guidance for Group A Streptococcal Cellulitis
license_notes: Use as government source support for cellulitis diagnosis, treatment framing, and complication risk. Avoid implying CDC endorses local discharge wording.
supports: Cellulitis is a bacterial skin infection that requires clinician-directed antibiotic treatment.
Clinicians should consider more serious infection when systemic toxicity, deep infection, or rapidly progressive symptoms are present.
Patient counseling should include monitoring for worsening infection and complications.
